fields.indication_summary: Phosphodiesterase-5 (PDE5) inhibitor indicated for the treatment of erectile dysfunction (ED).

notes: PI and SPL 'Revised:' dates agree (12/2017), but the patient-information insert mid-document carries its own older footer 'Revised: 08/2017' -- same third-date pattern as NORVASC in this set (FDA-approved patient labeling, not a Medication Guide, so medication_guide stays null and the date is recorded here). Oldest content revision in the new-document batch (2017), useful for testing date-recency assumptions. Three bottle NDCs, one per strength (0069-4200-30, 0069-4210-30, 0069-4220-30) plus a 100-count 0069-4220-66 in the SPL packaging data; no single value represents that, so ndc left null.
